must_have: A dedicated HTML page with semantic structure
Sections covering basic facts, habitat, diet, and conservation status
At least 2-3 relevant, high-quality images of red pandas
A responsive layout that works on mobile and desktop
Clear, accessible typography and color scheme
should_have: A simple CSS stylesheet for visual styling
Use of modern HTML5 and CSS3 features
A brief 'Fun Facts' or 'Did You Know?' section
Proper image alt text for accessibility
could_have: A lightweight interactive element (e.g., image gallery toggle)
